articles.title: Dogecoin Co-Creator Buys $DOGE ‘After 8 Years of Vowing Never to Buy Crypto Again’
articles.description: Billy Markus, one of the co-creators of the meme-inspired cryptocurrency Dogecoin (DOGE), has on social media revealed that “after 8 years of vowing never to buy crypto again” he decided to invest in the cryptocurrency he helped create. Markus’ tweet came after a wide cryptocurrency market crash that affect most top cryptoassets and was especially […]

articles.title: John McAfee Found Dead in Spanish Prison Ahead of Extradition to US, Report
articles.description: Antivirus software mogul John McAfee has been found dead in his cell within the Brians 2 prison near Barcelona, Spain.

articles.title: Crypto market cap recovers $76B, altcoins rally after Bitcoin hits $34K
articles.description: Bitcoin’s quick recovery to $34,800 ignited a rally in altcoins, boosting the total crypto market capitalization by $76 billion.

articles.title: Why ‘Ethereum’s woes’ have turned into Polygon’s wins?
articles.description: The Polygon network emerged as an alternative to decentralized finance users amid the volatility-driven period. articles.title: Dogecoin ($DOGE) Price Will Plunge to $0.05, Says Bitcoin Bull
articles.description: A widely followed pseudonymous cryptocurrency analyst and bitcoin bull has predicted that the price of the meme-inspired cryptocurrency Dogecoin (DOGE) is “programmed” to plunge to $0.05 and that even Tesla CEO Elon Musk would be unable to save it.
